title: Cardiovascular outcomes of empagliflozin-GLP-1RA combination therapy in type 2 diabetes: EMPRISE study
excerpt: The EMPRISE study evaluated cardiovascular outcomes in type 2 diabetes patients receiving combination therapy with empagliflozin (an SGLT2 inhibitor) and GLP-1 receptor agonists. The study contributes evidence on whether dual therapy with these two drug classes provides cardiovascular benefits in diabetic patients.

title: Machine Learning-Based PAT Tool for Real-Time Residual Moisture Monitoring in Lyophilized Biopharmaceuticals Using NIR Spectroscopy
excerpt: Researchers have developed a machine learning-based process analytical technology (PAT) tool that uses near-infrared (NIR) spectroscopy to monitor residual moisture in real-time during lyophilization of biopharmaceutical products. The tool integrates machine learning algorithms with NIR spectroscopic data to enable non-destructive, continuous assessment of moisture content in freeze-dried biopharmaceuticals. This approach supports real-time process control and quality assurance during lyophilization manufacturing.
